adjustment_requests	CREATE TABLE `adjustment_requests` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `actionId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `solicitanteId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `tipoSolicitante` enum('colaborador','lider') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `justificativa` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,

  `status` enum('pendente','aprovada','reprovada') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `justificativaAdmin` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `evaluatedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `evaluatedBy` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
